title: Touji Hot and Mo
wikitext:
[]: Touji: Hot and Moé?             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Tue Aug 04, 2009 6:58 am Eva Monkey said some of the responses in the Discussion -> Touji's Attire thread were out of place, so...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Aug 04, 2009 7:21 am *blank stare* I don't see how anyone could be moe over Touji. However, I will admit to thinking that Touji and Hikari are an adorable couple. There needs to be more fanart along those lines.

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Tue Aug 04, 2009 7:51 am I never found jock boys that 'moe', to be honest. o_O

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Tue Aug 04, 2009 8:42 am Toji? Moe? Hahaha, good one. He's just about the furthest from moe you can get, IMO. I could see where some might say he's hot, or handsome, but moe... Bit of a stretch. When I hear moe, I think of Mei from Clannad, and just about every other "little sister" character. 'cept for maybe Kyon's sister... Don't really think moe so much...

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Tue Aug 04, 2009 9:26 am The Eva Monkey wrote: *blank stare* I don't see how anyone could be moe over Touji.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Aug 04, 2009 9:36 am LOL NO

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Aug 04, 2009 10:03 am AuraTwilight wrote: Joseph the PRPD wrote: Because Toji is a bad ass who doesn't play by the rules.

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Tue Aug 04, 2009 10:51 am Oh. Well, hot can't always be equated to moe. There are instances where a hot character can be moe, but hot does not imply moe, and vice versa.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Tue Aug 04, 2009 11:07 am Touji may cause a flare-up of Osaka-ben moe but Seki isn't a real Osakan so they cancel out.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Tue Aug 04, 2009 3:42 pm Okay, I admit it, I have a problem.

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Tue Aug 04, 2009 4:01 pm Totally hot. Totally not moe.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Tue Aug 04, 2009 5:44 pm From what I understand, "moe" means a cute character whose flaws, commonly clumsiness, elicit a loving and protective response from the audience. Towards that end, Touji is most definitely not moe.

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Tue Aug 04, 2009 8:17 pm Monk Ed wrote: From what I understand, "moe" means a cute character whose flaws, commonly clumsiness, elicit a loving and protective response from the audience. Towards that end, Touji is most definitely not moe.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Wed Aug 05, 2009 12:33 am Touji

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Aug 05, 2009 12:52 am SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Wed Aug 05, 2009 12:54 am LOL, Moe is moe.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Aug 05, 2009 12:56 am Moe is indeed moe, hes not fugly or mug fugly at all.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Wed Aug 05, 2009 10:14 pm Oh, Touji a moe? In a word no; there’s very little about him that plays into that archetype: his design isn’t pretty or delicate/vulnerable looking at all (gymsuit aside you never see him wear anything weird or pretty) , his behavior and speaking style doesn’t convey any sort of vulnerability or sugariness, and his role is very much in line with what one might expect from a shonen character...I suppose unless if his Bumpkin accent or Fighting and losing to Asuka in the vein of AtE qualifies him it would be an absolute no. Although Touji could possibly be kakkoii in the same way Kaji is. And in some media it seems that hanging around moe characters somehow imparts moe elements on the nonmoe character if so puppy boy and Kensuke are rather moe (I guess the freckles, orangeish hair and weird camo and behavior make Kensuke moe, and Shinji needs no explenation) , but that moe induction doesn’t seem to be a universal effect and Kaworu and Kaji are both still kakkoii rather than moe so it’s probably safe to say that Touji isn’t moe and PuchiEva aside he probably will never be (I don’t think that would bother him though) .

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Wed Aug 05, 2009 10:22 pm ^ To be honest I was waiting for Synapsid's opinion on this.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Wed Aug 05, 2009 10:30 pm Really, you waited for me while I was on "vacation"? Thanks I guess, but I'm really trying to be as serious about this as the topic allows, unless if hanging around moe can somehow make him moe Touji isn't and couldn't be moe at all

Article: Touji Hot and Mo
 Wed Aug 05, 2009 10:14 pm Oh, Touji a moe? In a word no; there’s very little about him that plays into that archetype: his design isn’t pretty or delicate/vulnerable looking at all (gymsuit aside you never see him wear anything weird or pretty) , his behavior and speaking style doesn’t convey any sort of vulnerability or sugariness, and his role is very much in line with what one might expect from a shonen character...I suppose unless if his Bumpkin accent or Fighting and losing to Asuka in the vein of AtE qualifies him it would be an absolute no. Although Touji could possibly be kakkoii in the same way Kaji is. And in some media it seems that hanging around moe characters somehow imparts moe elements on the nonmoe character if so puppy boy and Kensuke are rather moe (I guess the freckles, orangeish hair and weird camo and behavior make Kensuke moe, and Shinji needs no explenation) , but that moe induction doesn’t seem to be a universal effect and Kaworu and Kaji are both still kakkoii rather than moe so it’s probably safe to say that Touji isn’t moe and PuchiEva aside he probably will never be (I don’t think that would bother him though) .
